entity_evidence.text: Utilization review agents shall make their policies and guidelines easily accessible to enrollees and providers in electronic format.

type_evidence.text: Utilization review agents shall make their policies and guidelines easily accessible to enrollees and providers in electronic format.

attribute_evidence.text: Utilization review agents shall make their policies and guidelines easily accessible to enrollees and providers in electronic format.

value_evidence.text: Utilization review agents shall make their policies and guidelines easily accessible to enrollees and providers in electronic format.

entity_evidence.text: A utilization review agent shall ensure that all coverage determinations are reviewed by a physician or other health care professional who is competent to evaluate and reject, if appropriate, any recommendation or conclusion of artificial intelligence that is in conflict with independent professional judgment as informed by an enrollee's unique clinical condition, the recommendation of the provider, and any applicable policies and guidelines
